source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Calm product English UI with Japanese typography guidance for reservation labels, calendar views, guest intake forms, wellness package names, and operational dashboards.
layout: Wellness booking workflows, multi-panel availability dashboards, 8px radii, mineral-blue primary actions, ochre warning states, steam-white surfaces, silica stone borders, and subtle geothermal texture.

prompts.label: Transparent hot spring pool motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hot Spring transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete hot spring pool motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural geothermal hot spring pool seen as a complete cutout: rounded mineral basin with creamy steam-white mineral crust, clear mineral-blue water, subtle turquoise depth, ochre travertine rim, pale silica terraces, small wet stone edge details, and soft visible steam wisps that stay separate from the background. Crisp geological edges, tactile mineral texture, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete hot spring pool cutout with generous padding, oval pool shape and terraced rim fully visible without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves mineral blue water, steam white highlights, ochre rim, and geothermal texture.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no spa building, no towels, no landscape horizon, no mountains, no plants, no signs, no props, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hot Spring light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Hot Spring, derived from the visible hot spring pool cutout.
System feel: wellness booking system for reserving soaking sessions, treatment rooms, spa packages, guest intake, calendar availability, staff schedules, and occupancy dashboards.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide high-resolution source board, 4K-class presentation. Use large readable labels, clean grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hot Spring, Hot Spring Pool, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Booking Navigation, Availability Dashboard, Forms, Calendar, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract steam white surfaces, mineral-blue water, turquoise depth, ochre travertine rim, silica stone texture, and warm geothermal field neutrals. Use these as semantic roles for a calm wellness booking product, not a marketing landing page.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, date picker, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top nav, sidebar, booking calendar, reservation list table, treatment filters, command palette, occupancy metrics, charts, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Typography: include English and Japanese UI examples, with short labels suitable for multilingual booking workflows.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, precise grid, restrained wellness UI, 8px radius, mineral texture accents, readable interface labels.
Constraints: no generic blue gradient UI, no unrelated saturated colors, no hotel stock photos, no people, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Hot Spring.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hot Spring dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Hot Spring that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
System feel: wellness booking system for reserving soaking sessions, treatment rooms, spa packages, guest intake, calendar availability, staff schedules, and occupancy dashboards.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide high-resolution source board, 4K-class presentation. Use large readable labels, clean grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hot Spring, Hot Spring Pool, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Booking Navigation, Availability Dashboard, Forms, Calendar, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve the same booking components and board structure from the light board. Translate steam white into luminous foregrounds, mineral blue into primary actions and focus states, ochre travertine into warnings and warm accents, silica stone into borders, and deep geothermal pool color into dark backgrounds.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, date picker, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar, booking calendar, reservation table, command palette, occupancy metrics, charts, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Typography: include English and Japanese UI examples, short readable labels, calm multilingual product tone.
Visual details: deep mineral pool background, subtle steam texture overlays, crisp dark cards, restrained contrast, no pure black flatness, refined wellness product polish.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black dashboard, no unrelated purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no people, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Hot Spring.
